headline: Codex companion CLI — one-shot delegate.py wrapper that auto-starts Optogon and drives the delegate_to_codex path to run OpenAI Codex, returning prose or schema-typed JSON.

capabilities.notes: Primary command. Positional intent string is classified and routed; on match Codex executes (default sandbox read-only, may escalate to workspace-write per outputs.sandbox). Exec of an external agent over the codebase => criticality 3.
Sets the working directory Codex operates in; targets which tree the delegated exec can read/write.
Typed handoff: passes output_schema_path so Codex returns schema-constrained JSON (review/decision/fact-extract/diff-summary) instead of prose.
Disables the Optogon auto-spawn; fails with exit 3 if :3010 is down. Controls lifecycle/spawn behavior.
Side effect of the default run: detaches a uvicorn process serving optogon.main:app on 127.0.0.1:3010 and waits up to 30s for /health. Spawns a long-lived background service.
Read-only liveness check against http://127.0.0.1:3010/health before any work; the safe public status read on this surface.
